class=\"block text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:text-neutral-100\n          \">\n          Jekyll\n        </a>\n      </li>\n    \n      <li>\n        <a \n          href=\"/dev-pages/docs/github-pages/\"\n          class=\"block text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:text-neutral-100\n          underline text-slate-900 dark:text-neutral-100\">\n          Github Pages\n        </a>\n      </li>\n    \n  </ul>\n  <a\n        id=\"add-page\"\n        href=\"https://github.com/cameronokeefe-topstep/dev-pages/tree/main/_posts\"\n         class=\"block text-slate-600 mt-4 hover:text-slate-900 transition dark:text-neutral-400 dark:hover:text-neutral-100\n          \"\n        target=\"_blank\"\n      >\n         <span class=\"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 px-1.5 py-1.5 mt-4 text-xs font-normal text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 transition dark:border-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-800\"><!-- _includes/icon.html -->\n\n<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" fill=\"currentColor\" class=\"bi bi-plus\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\">\n  <path d=\"M8 4a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v3h3a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-3v3a.5.5 0 0 1-1 0v-3h-3a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h3v-3A.5.5 0 0 1 8 4\"/>\n</svg> page</span>\n  </a>\n</div>\n\n        </aside>\n\n        <!-- Main Content -->\n        <main class=\"md:col-span-3 h-full article\">\n          <article class=\"prose prose-lg max-w-none prose-slate dark:prose-invert dark:prose-headings:text-neutral-100 dark:prose-p:text-neutral-200 dark:prose-strong:text-neutral-100 dark:prose-a:text-sky-400 dark:hover:prose-a:text-sky-300 dark:prose-code:text-neutral-100 dark:prose-pre:bg-neutral-900 dark:prose-pre:text-neutral-100\">\n  <h1>Github Pages</h1>\n  <p class=\"text-slate-500 text-sm dark:text-neutral-400 mb-8\">\n    February 23, 2026\n  </p>\n\n  <p><a href=\"https://docs.github.com/en/pages\">https://docs.github.com/en/pages</a></p>\n\n<h1 id=\"jekyll--github-pages--complete-user-guide\">Jekyll + GitHub Pages тАФ Complete User Guide</h1>\n\n<p>A practical, step-by-step guide to building and deploying a Jekyll website using GitHub Pages.</p>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"table-of-contents\">Table of Contents</h1>\n\n<ol>\n  <li>What YouтАЩre Building</li>\n  <li>Prerequisites</li>\n  <li>Creating a New Jekyll Site</li>\n  <li>Understanding the Project Structure</li>\n  <li>Running Jekyll Locally</li>\n  <li>Creating Posts and Pages</li>\n  <li>Configuring <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_config.yml</code></li>\n  <li>Using Liquid (Templating Basics)</li>\n  <li>Preparing for GitHub Pages</li>\n  <li>Deploying to GitHub Pages</li>\n  <li>Custom Domains</li>\n  <li>Troubleshooting</li>\n  <li>Best Practices</li>\n</ol>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"1-what-youre-building\">1. What YouтАЩre Building</h1>\n\n<p>Jekyll is a <strong>static site generator</strong>.</p>\n\n<p>You write:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>Markdown</li>\n  <li>HTML</li>\n  <li>YAML config</li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>Jekyll generates:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>Static HTML files</li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>GitHub Pages hosts:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>The generated static site</li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"2-prerequisites\">2. Prerequisites</h1>\n\n<p>Install:</p>\n\n<ul>\n  <li>Ruby (recommended via rbenv or asdf)</li>\n  <li>Bundler</li>\n  <li>Git</li>\n  <li>GitHub account</li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>Check versions:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>ruby <span class=\"nt\">-v</span>\ngem <span class=\"nt\">-v</span>\nbundle <span class=\"nt\">-v</span>\ngit <span class=\"nt\">--version</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"3-creating-a-new-jekyll-site\">3. Creating a New Jekyll Site</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"create-project\">Create project</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>gem <span class=\"nb\">install </span>jekyll bundler\njekyll new my-site\n<span class=\"nb\">cd </span>my-site\nbundle <span class=\"nb\">install</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<h2 id=\"project-structure\">Project structure</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>my-site/\nтФЬтФАтФА _config.yml\nтФЬтФАтФА _posts/\nтФЬтФАтФА _layouts/\nтФЬтФАтФА _includes/\nтФЬтФАтФА _site/        (generated)\nтФЬтФАтФА Gemfile\nтФФтФАтФА index.md\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"4-running-jekyll-locally\">4. Running Jekyll Locally</h1>\n\n<p>Start the development server:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll serve <span class=\"nt\">--livereload</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Visit:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>http://localhost:4000\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Build only:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll build\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Clean:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll clean\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"5-creating-posts\">5. Creating Posts</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"file-naming-format\">File naming format</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>_posts/YYYY-MM-DD-title.md\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Example:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-markdown highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code><span class=\"nn\">---</span>\n<span class=\"na\">layout</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">post</span>\n<span class=\"na\">title</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s2\">\"</span><span class=\"s\">My</span><span class=\"nv\"> </span><span class=\"s\">First</span><span class=\"nv\"> </span><span class=\"s\">Post\"</span>\n<span class=\"na\">date</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">2026-02-24</span>\n<span class=\"na\">categories</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"pi\">[</span><span class=\"nv\">blog</span><span class=\"pi\">]</span>\n<span class=\"na\">tags</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"pi\">[</span><span class=\"nv\">jekyll</span><span class=\"pi\">,</span> <span class=\"nv\">github</span><span class=\"pi\">]</span>\n<span class=\"nn\">---</span>\n\nThis is my first post.\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"6-creating-pages\">6. Creating Pages</h1>\n\n<p>Create a page like <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">about.md</code>:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-markdown highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code><span class=\"nn\">---</span>\n<span class=\"na\">layout</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">page</span>\n<span class=\"na\">title</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">About</span>\n<span class=\"na\">permalink</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">/about/</span>\n<span class=\"nn\">---</span>\n\nThis is the about page.\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"7-understanding-_configyml\">7. Understanding <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_config.yml</code></h1>\n\n<p>Example configuration:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-yaml highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code><span class=\"na\">title</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">My Website</span>\n<span class=\"na\">description</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">Personal blog</span>\n<span class=\"na\">url</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s2\">\"</span><span class=\"s\">https://username.github.io\"</span>\n<span class=\"na\">baseurl</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s2\">\"</span><span class=\"s\">\"</span>   <span class=\"c1\"># Use \"/repo-name\" for project sites</span>\n\n<span class=\"na\">markdown</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">kramdown</span>\n<span class=\"na\">permalink</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">/blog/:title/</span>\n\n<span class=\"na\">timezone</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s\">America/New_York</span>\n\n<span class=\"na\">plugins</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span>\n  <span class=\"pi\">-</span> <span class=\"s\">jekyll-feed</span>\n  <span class=\"pi\">-</span> <span class=\"s\">jekyll-seo-tag</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<h2 id=\"important-baseurl\">Important: baseurl</h2>\n\n<ul>\n  <li>User site тЖТ <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\"\"</code></li>\n  <li>Project site тЖТ <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">\"/repository-name\"</code></li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>Example:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-yaml highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code><span class=\"na\">baseurl</span><span class=\"pi\">:</span> <span class=\"s2\">\"</span><span class=\"s\">/my-repo\"</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"8-using-liquid-templating\">8. Using Liquid (Templating)</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"output-variables\">Output variables</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-liquid highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>Dev-pages\nGithub Pages\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<h2 id=\"loop-posts\">Loop posts</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-liquid highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>&lt;ul&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/sanity-to-webflow-blog/\"&gt;\n        Sanity to Webflow - blog\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/redirects/\"&gt;\n        Update Redirects\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/publishing/\"&gt;\n        Publishing Processes\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/jekyll-vuejs-spa/\"&gt;\n        Jekyll + Vuejs SPA\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/github-merges/\"&gt;\n        Github Merges\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/testpost/\"&gt;\n        My New Post\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/tailwind/\"&gt;\n        Tailwind\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/markdown/\"&gt;\n        Markdown\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/jekyll/\"&gt;\n        Jekyll\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n    &lt;li&gt;\n      &lt;a href=\"/dev-pages/docs/github-pages/\"&gt;\n        Github Pages\n      &lt;/a&gt;\n    &lt;/li&gt;\n  \n&lt;/ul&gt;\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<h2 id=\"conditionals\">Conditionals</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-liquid highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>\n  &lt;p&gt;This is a blog post&lt;/p&gt;\n\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"9-preparing-for-github-pages\">9. Preparing for GitHub Pages</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"commit-your-project\">Commit your project</h2>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>git init\ngit add <span class=\"nb\">.</span>\ngit commit <span class=\"nt\">-m</span> <span class=\"s2\">\"Initial commit\"</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<h2 id=\"create-github-repository\">Create GitHub repository</h2>\n\n<ul>\n  <li>Go to GitHub</li>\n  <li>Click тАЬNew RepositoryтАЭ</li>\n  <li>Name it:</li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>User site:</p>\n<div class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>username.github.io\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Project site:</p>\n<div class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>my-project\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"10-deploying-to-github-pages\">10. Deploying to GitHub Pages</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"option-a--let-github-build-jekyll-recommended-for-simple-sites\">Option A тАФ Let GitHub Build Jekyll (Recommended for simple sites)</h2>\n\n<p>Push to GitHub:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>git remote add origin https://github.com/username/repo-name.git\ngit branch <span class=\"nt\">-M</span> main\ngit push <span class=\"nt\">-u</span> origin main\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Then:</p>\n\n<ol>\n  <li>Go to Repository Settings</li>\n  <li>Click тАЬPagesтАЭ</li>\n  <li>Under тАЬSourceтАЭ тЖТ Select:\n    <ul>\n      <li>Branch: <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">main</code></li>\n      <li>Folder: <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">/ (root)</code></li>\n    </ul>\n  </li>\n  <li>Save</li>\n</ol>\n\n<p>Your site will be available at:</p>\n\n<p>User site:</p>\n<div class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>https://username.github.io\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Project site:</p>\n<div class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>https://username.github.io/repo-name/\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"option-b--deploy-built-_site-folder-advanced\">Option B тАФ Deploy Built <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_site/</code> Folder (Advanced)</h2>\n\n<p>Build locally:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll build\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Deploy <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_site/</code> contents to <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">gh-pages</code> branch.</p>\n\n<p>Often done with GitHub Actions.</p>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"11-custom-domain\">11. Custom Domain</h1>\n\n<ol>\n  <li>Add a <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">CNAME</code> file to project root:</li>\n</ol>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>example.com\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<ol>\n  <li>Commit and push</li>\n  <li>In GitHub Pages settings:\n    <ul>\n      <li>Add custom domain</li>\n    </ul>\n  </li>\n  <li>Configure DNS:\n    <ul>\n      <li>A record тЖТ GitHub IPs</li>\n      <li>OR CNAME тЖТ username.github.io</li>\n    </ul>\n  </li>\n</ol>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"12-github-pages-plugin-limitations\">12. GitHub Pages Plugin Limitations</h1>\n\n<p>GitHub Pages only supports approved plugins.</p>\n\n<p>Supported examples:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>jekyll-feed</li>\n  <li>jekyll-seo-tag</li>\n  <li>jekyll-sitemap</li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>If you need custom plugins:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>Use GitHub Actions</li>\n  <li>Build site yourself</li>\n  <li>Deploy static output</li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"13-drafts\">13. Drafts</h1>\n\n<p>Create <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_drafts/</code> folder.</p>\n\n<p>Add:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>_drafts/my-draft.md\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<p>Serve with:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll serve <span class=\"nt\">--drafts</span>\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"14-common-issues\">14. Common Issues</h1>\n\n<h2 id=\"broken-css-or-links\">Broken CSS or Links</h2>\n\n<p>Cause:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>Incorrect <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">baseurl</code></li>\n</ul>\n\n<p>Fix:\nUse:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-liquid highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>/dev-pages/assets/css/style.css\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"404-errors\">404 Errors</h2>\n\n<p>Cause:</p>\n<ul>\n  <li>Wrong permalink</li>\n  <li>Missing trailing slash</li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"liquid-errors\">Liquid Errors</h2>\n\n<p>Check terminal output for line numbers.</p>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h2 id=\"site-not-updating\">Site Not Updating</h2>\n\n<p>Try:</p>\n\n<div class=\"language-bash highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>bundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll clean\nbundle <span class=\"nb\">exec </span>jekyll serve\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"15-recommended-folder-structure\">15. Recommended Folder Structure</h1>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>.\nтФЬтФАтФА _config.yml\nтФЬтФАтФА _layouts/\nтФЬтФАтФА _includes/\nтФЬтФАтФА _posts/\nтФЬтФАтФА _data/\nтФЬтФАтФА assets/\nтФВ   тФЬтФАтФА css/\nтФВ   тФЬтФАтФА js/\nтФВ   тФФтФАтФА img/\nтФФтФАтФА index.md\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"16-best-practices\">16. Best Practices</h1>\n\n<ul>\n  <li>Always use <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">relative_url</code></li>\n  <li>Keep layouts minimal</li>\n  <li>Use collections for custom content types</li>\n  <li>Avoid heavy plugins</li>\n  <li>Keep <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_site/</code> out of git (add to <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">.gitignore</code>)</li>\n  <li>Test locally before pushing</li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"17-quick-deployment-checklist\">17. Quick Deployment Checklist</h1>\n\n<ul class=\"task-list\">\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Install Ruby + Bundler</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Create Jekyll site</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Configure <code class=\"language-plaintext highlighter-rouge\">_config.yml</code></li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Test locally</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Create GitHub repository</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Push code</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Enable GitHub Pages</li>\n  <li class=\"task-list-item\"><input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"task-list-item-checkbox\" disabled=\"disabled\" />Verify live URL</li>\n</ul>\n\n<hr />\n\n<h1 id=\"18-final-workflow-summary\">18. Final Workflow Summary</h1>\n\n<div class=\"language-text highlighter-rouge\"><div class=\"highlight\"><pre class=\"highlight\"><code>Write Markdown\n      тЖУ\nRun jekyll serve\n      тЖУ\nCommit &amp; push to GitHub\n      тЖУ\nGitHub Pages builds site\n      тЖУ\nWebsite is live\n</code></pre></div></div>\n\n<hr />\n\n<p>You now have a complete workflow for building and deploying Jekyll sites with GitHub Pages.</p>\n\n</article>\n\n        </main>\n\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <footer class=\"bg-slate-100 border-t border-slate-200 mt-16 dark:bg-neutral-950 dark:border-neutral-800\">\n  <div class=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-10 grid md:grid-cols-3 justify-items-start gap-8 text-sm text-slate-600 dark:text-neutral-400\">\n    \n    <!-- About -->\n </div>-->\n\n    <!-- Navigation -->\n    <!--<div>\n      <h3 class=\"font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3 dark:text-neutral-100\">Navigation</h3>\n      <ul class=\"space-y-2\">\n        \n href=\"/dev-pages/about/\" class=\"hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-neutral-100\">\n              About\n            </a>\n          </li>\n        \n          <li>\n            <a Social -->\n    <!--<div>\n      <h3 class=\"font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-3 dark:text-neutral-100\">Connect</h3>\n      <ul class=\"space-y-2\">\n        \n        \n        \n      </ul>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>-->\n\n  <div class=\"text-center text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-neutral-500\">\n    ┬й <span id=\"year\"></span> Dev-pages. All rights reserved.\n  </div>\n\n  <script>\n    (function () {\n      var root = document.documentElement;\n      var toggle = document.getElementById(\"theme-toggle\");\n      var key = \"theme\";\n\n      document.getElementById(\"year\").textContent = new Date().getFullYear();\n\n      if (!toggle) return;\n\n      function setTheme(theme, persist) {\n        var dark = theme === \"dark\";\n        root.classList.toggle(\"dark\", dark);\n        root.setAttribute(\"data-theme\", dark ? \"dark\" : \"light\");\n\n        if (persist) {\n          localStorage.setItem(key, dark ? \"dark\" : \"light\");\n        }\n\n        //toggle.textContent = dark ? \"Light\" : \"Dark\";\n        toggle.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", dark ? \"Switch to light mode\" : \"Switch to dark mode\");\n      }\n\n      setTheme(root.classList.contains(\"dark\") ? \"dark\" : \"light\", false);\n\n      toggle.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n        setTheme(root.classList.contains(\"dark\") ? \"light\" : \"dark\", true);\n      });\n    })();\n  </script>\n</footer>\n\n\n    <div id=\"bg\" class=\"fixed inset-0 w-full h-full opacity-60\" style=\"z-index:-1\"></div>\n    <script src=\"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js\"></script>\n    <script defer src=\"/dev-pages/assets/app/terrain.js\"></script>\n  </body>\n</html>\n"],"config":null,"data":{"navigation":[{"title":"Home","url":"/"},{"title":"Docs","url":"/app/"},{"title":"About","url":"/about/"},{"title":"Contact","url":"/contact/"}]},"pages":["This 30px;\n      *zoom: 1;\n    }\n    .row:before,\n    .row:after {\n      display: table;\n      content: \"\";\n      line-height: 0;\n    }\n    .row:after {\n      clear: both;\n    }\n    .span3 {\n      float: left;\n      min-height: 1px;\n      margin-left: 20px;\n      width: calc(25% - 20px);\n      text-align: center;\n    }\n    .container {\n      margin-right: auto;\n      margin-left: auto;\n      *zoom: 1;\n      text-align: center;\n    }\n    .container:before,\n    .container:after {\n      display: table;\n      content: \"\";\n      line-height: 0;\n    }\n text-decoration: inherit;\n      width: 1em;\n      height: 1em;\n      margin:0 auto;\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\n      text-align: center;\n      /* opacity: .8; */\n     \n      /* For safety - reset parent styles, that can break glyph codes*/\n      font-variant: normal;\n      text-transform: none;\n     \n      /* fix buttons height, for twitter bootstrap */\n      line-height: 1em;\n font-size: 120%; */\n     \n      /* Font smoothing. rgba(127, 127, 127, 0.3); */\n    }\n    .small-icons .demo-icon{\n      font-size:24px;\n      line-height: 1em;\n    }\n    </style>\n    <div class=\"wrap bg-slate-100 dark:bg-neutral-900\">\n ts-icon-article\">&#xe801;</i> <span class=\"i-name\">ts-icon-article</span><span class=\"i-code\">0xe801</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"span3\" title=\"Code: 0xe802\">\n          <i class=\"i-code\">0xe81d</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"span3\" title=\"Code: 0xe81e\">\n          <i class=\"demo-icon ts-icon-reset\">&#xe81e;</i> <span ts-icon-flash-forward\">&#xe81f;</i> <span class=\"i-name\">ts-icon-flash-forward</span><span class=\"i-code\">0xe81f</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"row\">\n        <div href=\"../assets/fonts/topstep-iconfont.zip\" target=\"_blank\">Download topstep-iconfont.zip</a>","<script type=\"importmap\">\n{\n  \"imports\": {\n    \"vue\": \"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vue@3/dist/vue.esm-browser.js\",\n    \"vue-router\": \"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vue-router@4/dist/vue-router.esm-browser.js\",\n    \"@vue/devtools-api\": \"https://esm.sh/@vue/devtools-api@6.6.4\"\n  }\n}\n</script>\n\n<div id=\"app\"></div>\n\n<script>\n  window.__BASEURL__ = \"{{ site.baseurl }}\"; // \"/dev-pages\"\n</script>\n\n<script type=\"module\" src=\"{{ '/assets/app/main.js' | relative_url }}\"></script>","<ul>\n  {% for post in site.posts %}\n    <li>\n      <a href=\"{{ post.url | relative_url }}\">{{ post.title }}</a>\n      <small>тАФ {{ post.date | date: \"%b %d, %Y\" }}</small>\n    </li>\n  {% endfor %}\n</ul>","<h1 class=\"text-3xl font-bold\">{{ site.title }}</h1>\n<p>{{ site.description }}</p>\n\n<h2>Latest docs (posts)</h2>\n<ul>\n  {% for post in site.posts limit:5 %}\n    <li>\n      <a href=\"{{ post.url | relative_url }}\">{{ post.title }}</a>\n      <small>тАФ {{ post.date | date: \"%b %d, %Y\" }}</small>\n    </li>\n  {% endfor %}\n</ul>\n\n\n## Add a new post\n\n1. Create a file in `_posts/` named `YYYY-MM-DD-title.md`.\n2. Add front matter and content, for example:\n\n```markdown\n---\nlayout: post\ntitle: \"My New Post\"\ndate: 2026-02-24\n---\n\nWrite your post content here.\n```\n\n3. Open `http://localhost:4000` after running `bundle exec jekyll serve` to confirm it renders.\n\n## Add a new page\n\n1. Create a new file in `pages/`, for example `pages/about.md`.\n2. Add front matter and content, for example:\n\n```markdown\n---\ntitle: \"About\"\npermalink: /about/\n---\n\nPage content goes here.\n```\n\n3. Visit `http://localhost:4000/about/` to verify the page.\n\n## Why You Should Always Use bundle exec\n\nInstead of:\n\n```bash\njekyll serve\n```\n\nYou should run:\n\n```bash\nbundle exec jekyll serve\n```\n\n## This ensures:\n\nYou're using the Jekyll version defined in your Gemfile\nNot some global Ruby version installed on your system\n\n## Run both\nIn one terminal (Ruby):\n\n```bash\nbundle exec jekyll serve\n```\n\nIn another terminal (Node):\n\n```bash\nnpm run tw:watch\n```\n\n","@import \"base\";\n\n\n","[\n  {% for post in site.posts %}\n  {\n    \"title\": {{ post.title | jsonify }},\n    \"date\": {{ post.date | date_to_xmlschema | jsonify }},\n    \"slug\": {{ post.slug | jsonify }},\n    \"url\": {{ post.url | relative_url | jsonify }},\n    \"content\": {{ post.content | strip_newlines | jsonify }},\n    \"excerpt\": {{ post.excerpt | strip_newlines | jsonify }},\n    \"tags\": {{ post.tags | jsonify }}\n  }{% unless forloop.last %},{% endunless %}\n  {% endfor %}\n]","<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?>{% if page.xsl %}<?xml-stylesheet type=\"text/xml\" href=\"{{ '/feed.xslt.xml' | absolute_url }}\"?>{% endif %}<feed xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom\" {% if site.lang %}xml:lang=\"{{ site.lang }}\"{% endif %}><generator uri=\"https://jekyllrb.com/\" version=\"{{ jekyll.version }}\">Jekyll</generator><link href=\"{{ page.url | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"self\" type=\"application/atom+xml\" /><link href=\"{{ '/' | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"alternate\" type=\"text/html\" {% if site.lang %}hreflang=\"{{ site.lang }}\" {% endif %}/><updated>{{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}</updated><id>{{ page.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</id>{% assign title = site.title | default: site.name %}{% if page.collection != \"posts\" %}{% assign collection = page.collection | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \" | \" | append: collection %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign category = page.category | capitalize %}{% assign title = title | append: \" | \" | append: category %}{% endif %}{% if title %}<title type=\"html\">{{ title | smartify | xml_escape }}</title>{% endif %}{% if site.description %}<subtitle>{{ site.description | xml_escape }}</subtitle>{% endif %}{% if site.author %}<author><name>{{ site.author.name | default: site.author | xml_escape }}</name>{% if site.author.email %}<email>{{ site.author.email | xml_escape }}</email>{% endif %}{% if site.author.uri %}<uri>{{ site.author.uri | xml_escape }}</uri>{% endif %}</author>{% endif %}{% if page.tags %}{% assign posts = site.tags[page.tags] %}{% else %}{% assign posts = site[page.collection] %}{% endif %}{% if page.category %}{% assign posts = posts | where: \"categories\", page.category %}{% endif %}{% unless site.show_drafts %}{% assign posts = posts | where_exp: \"post\", \"post.draft != true\" %}{% endunless %}{% assign posts = posts | sort: \"date\" | reverse %}{% assign posts_limit = site.feed.posts_limit | default: 10 %}{% for post in posts limit: posts_limit %}<entry{% if post.lang %}{{\" \"}}xml:lang=\"{{ post.lang }}\"{% endif %}>{% assign post_title = post.title | smartify | strip_html | normalize_whitespace | xml_escape %}<title type=\"html\">{{ post_title }}</title><link href=\"{{ post.url | absolute_url }}\" rel=\"alternate\" type=\"text/html\" title=\"{{ post_title }}\" /><published>{{ post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}</published><updated>{{ post.last_modified_at | default: post.date | date_to_xmlschema }}</updated><id>{{ post.id | absolute_url | xml_escape }}</id>{% assign excerpt_only = post.feed.excerpt_only | default: site.feed.excerpt_only %}{% unless excerpt_only %}<content type=\"html\" xml:base=\"{{ post.url | absolute_url | xml_escape }}\"><![CDATA[{{ post.content | strip }}]]></content>{% endunless %}{% assign post_author = post.author | default: post.authors[0] | default: site.author %}{% assign post_author = site.data.authors[post_author] | default: post_author %}{% assign post_author_email = post_author.email | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_uri = post_author.uri | default: nil %}{% assign post_author_name = post_author.name | default: post_author %}<author><name>{{ post_author_name | default: \"\" | xml_escape }}</name>{% if post_author_email %}<email>{{ post_author_email | xml_escape }}</email>{% endif %}{% if post_author_uri %}<uri>{{ post_author_uri | xml_escape }}</uri>{% endif %}</author>{% if post.category %}<category term=\"{{ post.category | xml_escape }}\" />{% elsif post.categories %}{% for category in post.categories %}<category term=\"{{ category | xml_escape }}\" />{% endfor %}{% endif %}{% for tag in post.tags %}<category term=\"{{ tag | xml_escape }}\" />{% endfor %}{% assign post_summary = post.description | default: post.excerpt %}{% if post_summary and post_summary != empty %}<summary type=\"html\"><![CDATA[{{ post_summary | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}]]></summary>{% endif %}{% assign post_image = post.image.path | default: post.image %}{% if post_image %}{% unless post_image contains \"://\" %}{% assign post_image = post_image | absolute_url %}{% endunless %}<media:thumbnail xmlns:media=\"http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/\" url=\"{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\" /><media:content medium=\"image\" url=\"{{ post_image | xml_escape }}\" xmlns:media=\"http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/\" />{% endif %}</entry>{% endfor %}</feed>"],"categories":{},"source":"/Users/topstepcameron/Desktop/Github/dev-pages","destination":"/Users/topstepcameron/Desktop/Github/dev-pages/_site","collections_dir":"","cache_dir":".jekyll-cache","plugins_dir":"_plugins","layouts_dir":"_layouts","data_dir":"_data","includes_dir":"_includes","safe":false,"include":[".htaccess"],"exclude":[".sass-cache",".jekyll-cache","gemfiles","Gemfile","Gemfile.lock","node_modules","vendor/bundle/","vendor/cache/","vendor/gems/","vendor/ruby/"],"keep_files":[".git",".svn"],"encoding":"utf-8","markdown_ext":"markdown,mkdown,mkdn,mkd,md","strict_front_matter":false,"show_drafts":null,"limit_posts":0,"future":false,"unpublished":false,"whitelist":[],"plugins":["jekyll-feed","jekyll-seo-tag","jekyll-tailwind"],"markdown":"kramdown","highlighter":"rouge","lsi":false,"excerpt_separator":"\n\n","incremental":false,"detach":false,"port":"4000","host":"127.0.0.1","baseurl":"/dev-pages","show_dir_listing":false,"permalink":"/docs/:title/","paginate_path":"/page:num","timezone":null,"quiet":false,"verbose":false,"defaults":[{"scope":{"path":"","type":"posts"},"values":{"layout":"post"}},{"scope":{"path":"pages"},"values":{"layout":"page"}}],"liquid":{"error_mode":"warn","strict_filters":false,"strict_variables":false},"kramdown":{"auto_ids":true,"toc_levels":[1,2,3,4,5,6],"entity_output":"as_char","smart_quotes":"lsquo,rsquo,ldquo,rdquo","input":"GFM","hard_wrap":false,"guess_lang":true,"footnote_nr":1,"show_warnings":false,"syntax_highlighter":"rouge","syntax_highlighter_opts":{"default_lang":"plaintext","guess_lang":true},"coderay":{}},"url":"http://localhost:4000","title":"Dev-pages","description":"A modern Markdown + Tailwind, Jekyll site hosted on Github Pages","serving":true,"watch":true}</pre>

Common gotchas

  • Missing front matter тЖТ file wonтАЩt be processed as expected
  • baseurl mismatch тЖТ broken links/assets on GitHub Pages project sites
  • Wrong permalink тЖТ 404s
  • Liquid syntax errors тЖТ build fails; check terminal output line numbers
  • Windows line endings can sometimes cause weirdness in scripts/config

Quick Templates (copy/paste)

_layouts/post.html

---
layout: default
---
<article class="prose">
  <h1>{{ page.title }}</h1>
  <p class="meta">{{ page.date | date: "%B %d, %Y" }}</p>
  {{ content }}
</article>

Blog index page (blog.md)

---
layout: page
title: Blog
permalink: /blog/
---

<ul>
  {% for post in site.posts %}
    <li>
      <a href="{{ post.url | relative_url }}">{{ post.title }}</a>
      <small>{{ post.date | date: "%b %d, %Y" }}</small>
    </li>
  {% endfor %}
</ul>

Simple nav include (_includes/header.html)

<header>
  <a href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">{{ site.title }}</a>
  <nav>
    <a href="{{ '/blog/' | relative_url }}">Blog</a>
    <a href="{{ '/about/' | relative_url }}">About</a>
  </nav>
</header>

Handy Reference: Variables YouтАЩll Use Most

Site-level

  • site.title, site.description
  • site.url, site.baseurl
  • site.posts
  • site.pages
  • site.data.*
  • site.collections

Page/post-level

  • page.title, page.url, page.permalink
  • page.date, page.categories, page.tags
  • content (only inside layouts)

Checklist: Starting a New Jekyll Site

  • Create _config.yml with url and baseurl
  • Add _layouts/default.html with '{{ content }}'
  • Add _includes/head.html, header.html, footer.html
  • Create index.md
  • Add first post in _posts/
  • Serve locally with bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
  • Deploy _site/ or let GitHub Pages build (depending on plugin needs)
